# Pull Request

## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation / design
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore
- [ ] ✅ Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the mandated development order ([docs/ROADMAP.md](../docs/ROADMAP.md))
- [ ] Everything user-facing is in English
- [ ] Free tier stays 100% free (no paid service introduced)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens or personal data in code, tests or fixtures
- [ ] Moderation changes keep decisions explainable and include corpus tests
- [ ] `lint`, `typecheck` and `test` pass locally (from milestone M1)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if user-visible
